title: Direct-named maintenance ask; unaddressed agent must PASS
failure_mode: no addressee recognition; classifier scores the ask identically for every agent and over-triggers for unaddressed Vigil (FR-018)
invariant: an ask named to a different agent PASSes for unnamed agents
rationale: Same trigger as d-named-ask-dalgos-addressed, evaluated as Vigil. The operator addressed Dalgos by name; Vigil has no addressee claim and must stay silent.
